"C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\18\Community\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\CMake\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\DungeonRaidTest.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\DungeonRaidTest.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\DungeonRaidTest.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\c++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\DungeonRaidTest.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o DungeonRaidTest.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libDungeonRaidTest.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\DungeonRaidTest.dir\linkLibs.rsp
